name: HR operations managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll entries/month tool
description: For HR operations managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll entries/month, discrepancies in time tracking cause payroll errors. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of time tracking and payroll data.
target_audience: HR operations managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll entries/month
problem_solved: Discrepancies between employee time tracking and payroll entries
features: manual entry for time tracking data

locked_fields.primary_user: HR operations managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll entries/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Discrepancies between employee time tracking and payroll entries
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For HR operations managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll entries/month, discrepancies in time tracking cause payroll errors. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of time tracking and payroll data.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual reconciliation of time tracking and payroll data
must_have_features: manual entry for time tracking data

one_liner: For HR operations managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll entries/month, discrepancies in time tracking cause payroll errors. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of time tracking and payroll data.
